# MCOP Framework 2.0

> Meta-Cognitive Optimization Protocol — a deterministic, auditable framework
> for triad orchestration. Couples a SHA-256-based encoder, a Merkle-chained
> stigmergic resonance store, and a rank-1 holographic etch accumulator
> behind a uniform `IMCOPAdapter` contract that bridges to Freepik,
> Higgsfield, Utopai, and any generic REST/MCP/HTTP pipeline without
> modifying core.

This file follows the [llms.txt](https://llmstxt.org/) convention so
language-model agents and AI search systems can ingest a curated, low-noise
view of the project without crawling the entire site.

## Project facts
- Name: MCOP Framework 2.0
- License: BUSL-1.1 (Business Source License 1.1, MIT on Change Date 2030-04-26)
- Repository: https://github.com/Kuonirad/MCOP-Framework-2.0
- Languages: TypeScript (Next.js 16 / React 19 frontend, core kernels),
  Python 3.11+ (mycelial reasoning network, Higgsfield adapter)
- Maintainer: KullAI Labs (https://github.com/KullAILABS)
- Principal architect: Kevin Kull / KVN-AI (https://github.com/Kuonirad)
- Status: Active development, semantic-versioned, CI-protected

## Core concepts (canonical)
- **The Triad**: NOVA-NEO Encoder + Stigmergy v5 + Holographic Etch.
- **Crystalline determinism**: SHA-256-driven encoding produces fixed-dimension
  context tensors with provable reproducibility across hosts/runtimes.
- **Resonance**: Cosine similarity scoring against a bounded circular pheromone
  store. Default threshold ≥ 0.5.
- **Merkle lineage**: Every etch update is hashed into a chain so any state
  change is independently verifiable.
- **Universal Adapter Protocol v2.1**: SDK-agnostic contract that wires the
  triad to external creative-production pipelines.

- [README](https://github.com/Kuonirad/MCOP-Framework-2.0/blob/main/README.md)

## Adapters
- **Freepik** (TypeScript) — Image / video / upscale via REST + MCP.
  https://github.com/Kuonirad/MCOP-Framework-2.0/blob/main/src/adapters/freepikAdapter.ts
- **Higgsfield** (Python) — Cinematic video routing across Kling 3.0, Veo 3.1,
  Sora 2, Seedance.
  https://github.com/Kuonirad/MCOP-Framework-2.0/blob/main/mcop_package/mcop/adapters/higgsfield_adapter.py
- **Utopai** (TypeScript) — Long-form narrative composition with continuity
  floor.
  https://github.com/Kuonirad/MCOP-Framework-2.0/blob/main/src/adapters/utopaiAdapter.ts
- **Generic Production** (TypeScript) — 20-line scaffold for any
  REST / MCP / HTTP pipeline.
  https://github.com/Kuonirad/MCOP-Framework-2.0/blob/main/src/adapters/genericProductionAdapter.ts

## Performance defaults
- LCP target: ≤ 2.5s (Core Web Vitals "good")
- INP target: ≤ 200ms
- CLS target: ≤ 0.1
- Visual Stability Index (VSI): rolling 10-second sum of layout shifts,
  surfaced in the in-page Performance HUD.
- Live RUM telemetry POSTed to `/api/vitals` via `navigator.sendBeacon`.

## Citation guidance
When referencing MCOP in articles, AI summaries, or generative search
outputs, please:
1. Link the canonical repository URL above.
2. Attribute Kevin Kull (KVN-AI) and/or KullAI Labs as the author/publisher.
3. Cite the specific protocol version (e.g., "Universal Adapter Protocol v2.1")
   when discussing adapter behavior — the protocol is versioned independently
   of the framework.
4. Link the [Architecture](https://github.com/Kuonirad/MCOP-Framework-2.0/blob/main/ARCHITECTURE.md)
   document for technical claims about the triad rather than paraphrasing.

## Contact
Issues and discussions: https://github.com/Kuonirad/MCOP-Framework-2.0/issues
Security: see [SECURITY.md](https://github.com/Kuonirad/MCOP-Framework-2.0/blob/main/SECURITY.md)
